title: T-031 — Server Actions: createBrief + saveBriefDraft (NPD-b.1) [PATCH: createBrief creates project]
prompt:
# T-031 — Brief CRUD actions

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §9.2 (form validation), §2.2 (brief.create)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx:46-86 (brief_create_modal)

## Goal
Server Actions createBrief(template, devCode) and saveBriefDraft(briefId, fields) with Zod validation: dev_code regex /^DEV\d{4}-\d+$/, volume>0 per row, multi_component summary weight = sum components ± tolerance.

## Implementation contract
New apps/web/app/(npd)/brief/actions/create-brief.ts + save-brief-draft.ts. Zod schema enforces template enum, dev_code regex, volume positivity, multi-comp weight invariant. RBAC brief.create. createBrief inserts brief + sample brief_lines row (line_type='product'). Emit brief.created event.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/brief/actions/create-brief.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/brief/actions/save-brief-draft.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/brief/actions/__tests__/create-brief.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/brief/actions/__tests__/save-brief-draft.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given role npd_manager calls createBrief('multi_component','DEV26-052'), when run, then brief row + 1 product line exist and brief.created event emitted
2. Given dev_code='DEV-XX', when createBrief called, then ValidationError with code 'DEV_CODE_FORMAT' thrown
3. Given multi_component summary weight 1000g vs sum components 850g (>1% tolerance), when saveBriefDraft runs, then ValidationError with code 'WEIGHT_MISMATCH' thrown

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests covering happy path, dev_code format, weight invariant
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test create-brief save-brief-draft'

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass weight invariant
- Do not skip RBAC
- Do not commit empty brief without 1 product line

## 2026-05-03 E2E spine patch — createBrief also creates canonical NPD project
Change `createBrief(template, devCode)` from brief-only creation to the first E2E spine action. In one transaction it must create the brief, create/link an `npd_projects` row at G0 with project code/dev code, set `brief.npd_project_id`, and emit both `brief.created` and `npd.project.created` in deterministic order.

Constraints:
- The project is the canonical DEV artefact (`DEV-123` style) for all later gates.
- No FG/Product row is created here; FG candidate mapping is a G3 action (T-095).
- D365 must not be invoked or required.

pipeline_inputs.description: createBrief + saveBriefDraft Server Actions with Zod-enforced dev_code regex, volume positivity, weight invariant.
pipeline_inputs.details: Two actions sharing brief Zod schema. RBAC + emit brief.created on insert. saveBriefDraft updates fields and recomputes summary weight invariant on multi_component.
out_of_scope: Do not implement Convert action here (T-033)
acceptance_criteria: Given role npd_manager calls createBrief('multi_component','DEV26-052'), when run, then brief row + 1 product line exist and brief.created event emitted
Given dev_code='DEV-XX', when createBrief called, then ValidationError with code 'DEV_CODE_FORMAT' thrown
Given multi_component summary weight 1000g vs sum components 850g (>1% tolerance), when saveBriefDraft runs, then ValidationError with code 'WEIGHT_MISMATCH' thrown
Given role npd_manager calls createBrief('multi_component','DEV26-052'), when run, then brief row + npd_projects row at G0 are created in one transaction and linked by npd_project_id.
Given the transaction commits, when outbox is inspected, then events appear in order brief.created → npd.project.created.
Given createBrief is retried after a transient failure with the same idempotency key/dev_code, then no duplicate project is created.
test_strategy: RED: 3 tests covering happy path, dev_code format, weight invariant before actions exist
risk_red_lines: Do not commit empty brief without 1 product line
Do not leave Brief and Stage-Gate as separate unlinked modules.
Do not create/map an FG in createBrief; G3 owns that.
